_help: Each check re-derives a published number from a committed script. A submission that reports a number adds an entry here: name it, give the exact command (use 'python -m ...' run from the repo root), and list strings from its output that must appear (verbatim, including the number). CI runs ci/reproduce.py on every pull request; a check fails if the command exits non-zero or any expected string is missing. Keep checks fast and deterministic. See PUBLISHING.md.

checks.name: parity-determination
expect: parity functions ['XOR', 'XNOR'] lead: 4/16 each vs 2/16 for monotone
